name: The Sugarhill Gang
description:
'''The Sugarhill Gang''' is an American [[old-school hip-hop]] group formed in [[Englewood, New Jersey]], in 1979. Their hit "[[Rapper's Delight]]", released the same year they were formed, was the first rap single to become a [[top 40]] hit on the [[Billboard Hot 100|''Billboard'' Hot 100]], reaching a peak position of number 36 on January 12, 1980. This was the trio's only U.S. hit, though they would have further success in Europe until the mid-1980s. The trio reformed in 1994 and embarked on a world tour in 2016.

The group are considered [[hip-hop]] pioneers. Their old-school hip-hop sound combined [[rapping]] with samples from [[disco]], [[funk]] and [[Soul music|soul]]. Thus, paving the way for [[Electro (music)|electro]] and [[East Coast hip-hop]].
